calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Between Olubajo Brooks And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Evan Chait of the law offices of Christopher R. Milton (800.449.6311) appears via telephone as counsel for petitioner/transferee

Olubajo Brooks appears In Propria Persona as payee/transferor

Court compliments transferor, Olubajo Brooks as set forth in the transcript. Court hears from both sides.

PETITIONER CATALINA STRUCTURED FUNDING, INC.'S Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Between Olubajo Brooks And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is GRANTED as set forth in the record. Petitioner shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim and that complies with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)

Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Between Olubajo Brooks And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq.
Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Continued To Feb-14-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Between Olubajo Brooks And Catalina Structured Funding, Inc. Pursuant To California Insurance Code 10134, Et Seq. is continued to February 14, 2017 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HK)
